The '''TL-118 "StarHammer" Short-range Attack Ship''' was a heavy assault [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufactured by [[Sublight Products Corporation|Subpro Corporation]]. It was 35 meters long, it carried 1 pilot, 1 gunner, and 1 week's worth of [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]].<ref name="IA" />

The craft could achieve 300 kilometers per hour and had a Class 3 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]. The craft's armament included 2 heavy laser cannons, 2 light laser cannons, 2 fire-linked twin laser cannons, 1 [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher, and air-to-surface bombs. It was also shielded.<ref name="IA" />

Subpro hoped to sell the craft to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], but the Republic transformed into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The Empire rejected the seemingly impressive craft due to its unfortunate faults: a single blow in combat to the ship's ion engines caused them to send the ship out-of-control at maximum speed. The craft was also lacking in maneuverability.<ref name="IA" />

Subpro's single production run was sold to local militias, private security forces, and even criminals.<ref name="IA" />
